text: Hello. Hi, my name is Hannah. I'm calling about the final expense insurance option that may help cover funeral, burial, or cremation. Okay, okay, okay. To check basic eligibility, so can you please confirm, are you between 40 and 85 years old? It will only take about 30 seconds to explain how this could benefit you and your family. Let me ask you this. So, what's your age? Are you somewhere between 40 and 85? To review, re-record, or add to your message, press 1. Can you hear me? To mark your message urgent, press 2. To mark your message private, press 3. To send your message as is, press pound.
